what_happened: Built Watchdog v3 with threading rule enforcement (Rules A/B/C). Also captured new 'no duplicate replies' rule from Xiaosong. The rule: if another agent already replied with the same info, react with emoji only - don't post a duplicate text reply.
what_worked: Watchdog v3 now enforces: Rule A (top-level must end with :thread:), Rule B (replies must NOT end with :thread:), Rule C (starters >500 chars warned). Detection via ts==thread_ts for top-level vs reply.
what_failed: An edit to AGENTS.md failed (stale match) during the duplicate-reply rule write. Admin confirmed the rule was already present, so non-blocking.
lesson: When writing to AGENTS.md from heartbeat, use Add-Content not edit (concurrent session risk). Also: emoji react IS a valid response - not every message needs a text reply.
pattern_candidate: emoji-react-as-response: Reacting with emoji counts as acknowledgment. Default should be react-only unless adding unique delta.
